name: Channel
description: Draw ambient energy inward and project it outward as a raw arcane pulse. Scales with Conviction and Ambition equally.

name: Prayer
description: Center the spirit through focused devotion, attuning to forces beyond the physical.

name: Attunement
description: Resonate with living and natural systems, sensing the flow of life around you.

name: Stalk
description: Move with deliberate patience, tracking without being noticed.

name: Aim
description: Focus and make a precise attack with your equipped weapon. Slower and has a higher crit chance than a Basic Attack. Scales best with Ambition.

name: Apply Poison
description: Coat your weapon with poison.

name: Apply Stun Effect
description: Coat your weapon with a stunning agent.

name: Basic Attack
description: A fundamental weapon attack. The weapon does not matter, but this skill scales with Conviction more than Ambition.

name: Block
description: Raise your guard to reduce incoming damage. Scales primarily with Endurance.

name: All Stats Buff
description: Increase all attributes.

name: Defense Buff
description: Increase armor and damage resistance.

name: Loot Rate Buff
description: Increase the chance of finding rare items.

name: Speed Buff
description: Increase attack speed and evasion.

name: Strength Buff
description: Increase conviction and damage output.

name: Chill
description: Freeze enemies with cold magic. Scales primarily with Conviction and Ambition, but Endurance effects it as well.

name: Climb
description: Climb a surface to reach new areas.

name: Deploy Caltrops
description: Deploy caltrops to damage enemies.

name: Deploy Stun Trap
description: Deploy a trap that stuns enemies.

name: First Aid
description: Apply basic medical treatment to restore health. Scales with Harmony and Conviction.

name: Focus
description: Concentrate your power for enhanced effectiveness.

name: Footwork
description: Move with agility to evade attacks.

name: Grant Skill Point
description: Grant a skill point to improve abilities.

name: Major Heal
description: Restore a large amount of health.

name: Light Area
description: Illuminate the surrounding area.

name: Misdirect
description: Confuse your enemies with feints and misdirection. Briefly lowers Harmony and Ambition.

name: Bleed
description: Cause the target to bleed, dealing damage over time.

name: Burn
description: Inflict a burning effect on the target.

name: Burn (AOE)
description: Burn all nearby enemies.

name: Chill
description: Slow the target with a chilling effect.

name: Chill (AOE)
description: Chill all nearby enemies.

name: Chime
description: Ring out with a protective sound.

name: Disorient
description: Disorient the target, reducing their accuracy.

name: Echo
description: Amplify the effect of the next spell.

name: Fade
description: Reduce damage taken temporarily.

name: Harmony
description: Restore balance to the group.

name: Holy Light
description: Heal with divine light.

name: Lullaby
description: Soothe the target with a calming effect.

name: Melody
description: Enhance harmony through song.

name: Poison
description: Poison the target, dealing damage over time.

name: Resonance
description: Amplify effects across multiple targets.

name: Shock
description: Stun the target with electrical damage.

name: Silence
description: Silence the target, preventing spell casting.

name: Stealth
description: Become harder to hit.

name: Stun
description: Stun the target, preventing their next action.

name: Stun (AOE)
description: Stun all nearby enemies.

name: Whisper
description: A subtle enchantment effect.

name: Produce Flame
description: Generate a flame to damage enemies. Scales with Conviction and Ambition equally.

name: Rest
description: Take a moment to catch your breath and recover. Restores Stamina. Scales with Endurance.

name: Major Mana Restoration
description: Restore a large amount of mana.

name: Minor Mana Restoration
description: Restore a small amount of mana.

name: Minor Stamina Restoration
description: Restore a moderate amount of stamina.

name: Small Stamina Restoration
description: Restore a small amount of stamina.

name: Reveal Area
description: Reveal hidden items and passages.

name: Sense
description: Heighten awareness to read the battlefield — strip stealth and evasion from a target, and boost your own evasion.

name: Shock
description: Strike with electrical energy. Electrifies enemies, dealing minor damage per turn and lowering Conviction. Scales with Conviction and Ambition equally.

name: Shout
description: Rally your allies with a powerful cry.

name: Shove
description: Push an enemy back with force. Scales with Conviction primarily. Causes the Knockback condition, increasing enemy skill delay.

name: Fireball
description: Launch a ball of fire at all enemies.

name: Lightning Strike
description: Strike a target with lightning.

name: Resurrect
description: Bring an ally back to life.

name: Mass Resurrect
description: Bring all defeated allies back to life.

name: Teleport
description: Teleport to a random location.

name: Safe Teleport
description: Teleport to a known safe location.

name: Throw Knife
description: Throw a knife at an enemy.

name: Unlock Door
description: Unlock a locked door or chest.

name: Use Escape Rope
description: Use a rope to escape from danger.

name: Use Health Potion
description: Drink a health potion to restore HP.

name: Use Health Potion
description: Drink a health potion to restore HP.

name: Use Mana Potion
description: Drink a mana potion to restore mana.

name: Use Mana Potion
description: Drink a mana potion to restore mana.

name: Use Smoke Bomb
description: Use a smoke bomb to escape from danger.

name: Use Stamina Potion
description: Drink a stamina potion to restore stamina.

name: Desperate Attack
description: A reckless, exhausting attack made when all other options are spent. Leaves you vulnerable.

name: Catch Breath
description: Sacrifice a turn to desperately recover stamina, but leave your defenses cracked.

name: Mental Fog
description: Mana depletion causes severe confusion and disorientation. You stumble blindly.

name: Wild Flail
description: Swing wildly with no technique. High variance, low accuracy, but might hit hard.

name: Last Stand
description: Draw upon remaining life force to generate energy. Restores resources but damages and curses you.

name: Lunge
description: Commit forward with explosive force, closing distance in an instant.

name: Strong Attack
description: A well placed blow dealing extra damage. Higher miss rate.

name: Weak Point
description: Study and exploit a gap in the target's guard.

name: Skirmish
description: Strike and reposition in one fluid motion.

name: Thunderclap
description: A concussive electric burst that rattles bone and mind.

name: Frost Slide
description: Ride a lance of ice across the ground into the target.

name: Scorched Shot
description: A precise strike that leaves the wound burning.

name: Sleet
description: Electrified ice shards that slow and shock simultaneously.

name: Singe
description: A melee strike charged with heat. The wound smolders.

name: Frostbite
description: A chilling strike that seeps cold into the target's limbs.

name: Warcry
description: A rallying cry that sharpens the fighting spirit of all allies.

name: Mend
description: A focused treatment that draws on both skill and reagent to close wounds properly.

name: Arcane Bolt
description: Focuses mental energy into a concentrated projectile of raw magic.

name: Shadow Bolt
description: Twists spiritual attunement and deception into a bolt of dark energy.

name: Holy Light
description: Channels faith through practical care to manifest healing radiance.

name: Nature Touch
description: Resonates with living systems during rest to accelerate natural recovery.

name: Apply Poison
description: Uses knowledge of natural toxins and deception to coat weapons.

name: Smite
description: Infuses a basic physical strike with divine conviction.

name: Arcane Strike
description: Channels raw energy directly into a physical blow.

name: Slash
description: A precise cutting motion combining force with targeting.

name: Pummel
description: A heavy impact combining shoving force with a direct strike.

name: Pierce
description: A targeted thrust utilizing footwork to close distance accurately.

name: Stone Skin
description: Hardens the body by resonating with the earth while blocking.

name: Blood Letting
description: A slash aimed specifically at vulnerable points to cause bleeding.

name: Mind Spike
description: Focuses mental energy into a shock that targets the nervous system.

name: Shadow Step
description: Uses misdirection and footwork to vanish momentarily.

name: Vitality Boost
description: Accelerates natural recovery through deep rest and attunement.

name: Flaming Edge
description: Coats a slashing weapon in sustained flame for extra damage.

name: Ice Pierce
description: A piercing thrust that freezes the wound upon impact.

name: Shocking Blow
description: Delivers a pummeling strike charged with electric energy.

name: Arcane Lunge
description: Propels the fighter forward with arcane energy during a lunge.

name: Holy Smite
description: A divine strike empowered by the radiance of holy light.

name: Shadow Strike
description: A physical attack infused with the deceptive power of shadow.

name: Venomous Slash
description: A cutting attack that injects natural toxins into the wound.

name: Nature Wrap
description: Uses a shoving motion to entangle the enemy in living vines.

name: Burning Aura
description: Projects a shout that ignites the air around the caster.

name: Frost Nova
description: Releases a wave of cold energy through a forceful projection.

name: Arcane Barrier
description: Constructs a shield of magical energy to block incoming attacks.

name: Shadow Veil
description: Wraps the caster in shadows to obscure their presence.

name: Healing Light
description: Expands holy light into an area of effect restorative field.

name: Regrowth
description: Accelerates natural healing over time using nature magic.

name: Poison Cloud
description: Releases a toxic gas cloud through a forceful exhalation.

name: Counter Strike
description: A defensive slash executed immediately after blocking.

name: Riposte
description: A precise piercing counter-attack following a successful block.

name: Blood Fury
description: Enters a rage state fueled by the sight of bleeding wounds.

name: Mental Fortitude
description: Strengthens the mind against shock and mental intrusion.

name: Assassinate
description: A lethal strike from stealth targeting a known weak point.

name: Vitality Surge
description: A shout that amplifies the body's natural recovery rate.

name: Stone Fist
description: Encases the fist in stone for a devastating pummeling attack.

name: Lightning Chain
description: Arcs electric energy between multiple targets.

name: Ice Shard
description: Forms a sharp projectile of ice for long-range precision.

name: Fireball
description: Condenses flame into a volatile sphere of explosive energy.

name: Shadow Tendril
description: Manifests shadows into grasping limbs to restrain enemies.

name: Holy Word
description: Speaks a divine command that heals and protects allies.

name: Entangle
description: Causes roots to erupt from the ground to trap moving enemies.

name: Acid Splash
description: Corrosive ice that melts armor and chills the bone.

name: Mana Shield
description: Converts resting mana into a protective barrier.

name: Inferno Slice
description: A lunging attack that leaves a trail of fire.

name: Glacial Javelin
description: A massive spear of ice thrown with piercing precision.

name: Storm Hammer
description: A heavy blow that calls down lightning upon impact.

name: Arcane Dash
description: Teleports short distances while striking with arcane energy.

name: Divine Judgment
description: A focused holy strike that punishes the wicked.

name: Void Rend
description: Tears reality with a shadow-infused slash.

name: Plague Carrier
description: Spreads a virulent poison through a cutting attack.

name: Primal Crush
description: A nature-infused smash that roots the enemy in place.

name: Ring of Fire
description: Creates a moving circle of flame around the caster.

name: Blizzard
description: A massive storm of ice and wind that slows all enemies.

name: Spell Reflection
description: Reflects incoming magic using an arcane barrier.

name: Shadow Clone
description: Creates a decoy from shadow to misdirect enemies.

name: Mass Heal
description: A powerful restorative light that heals all allies.

name: Forest Embrace
description: Heals allies while entangling enemies in the same area.

name: Toxic Fog
description: A stealthy poison cloud that obscures vision.

name: Shield Bash
description: A heavy counter-attack using the shield as a weapon.

name: Bleed Out
description: Exploits bleeding wounds to deal massive damage.

name: Psychic Barrier
description: A mental shield that reinforces arcane defenses.

name: Silent Death
description: An untraceable assassination from the shadows.

name: Berserker Rage
description: A warcry that pushes the body beyond its limits.

name: Earthquake
description: Slams the ground with stone fists to shatter the earth.

name: Chain Lightning
description: A focused bolt of lightning that arcs to multiple targets.

name: Ice Lance
description: A long-range piercing projectile of absolute cold.

name: Meteor
description: Calls down a burning rock from the sky.

name: Shadow Grasp
description: Tendrils of shadow that drain life from the enemy.

name: Phoenix Strike
description: A fiery attack that heals the user on critical hits.

name: Absolute Zero
description: Freezes the target completely, stopping time briefly.

name: Thunder God
description: Becomes one with the storm, striking all enemies.

name: Blink Strike
description: Teleports behind the enemy and strikes with arcane force.

name: Heaven's Fury
description: A divine AOE attack that purges evil.

name: Demon Form
description: Transforms into a shadow entity, boosting all stats.

name: Bio Hazard
description: Creates a zone of toxic nature magic that decays everything.

name: Titan Foot
description: A massive stomp that crushes and roots enemies.

name: Hellfire
description: Unholy fire that burns the soul as well as the body.

name: Permafrost
description: An eternal winter that freezes enemies in place.

name: Mirror Image
description: Creates perfect magical copies of the caster.

name: Necromancy
description: Drains life from enemies to heal the caster.

name: Executioner
description: A holy strike that instantly kills weakened foes.

name: Mind Control
description: Takes control of an enemy's mind temporarily.

name: Void Walk
description: Steps into the shadow realm, becoming untouchable.

name: Sunfall
description: Calls down the power of the sun to incinerate the battlefield.

name: Eternal Winter
description: Freezes time and space in a domain of absolute cold.

name: Storm of a Thousand Storms
description: Summons a cataclysmic electrical storm.

name: Reality Fracture
description: Shatters the fabric of space to damage and confuse enemies.

name: Apocalypse
description: Unleashes holy fire upon the world.

name: Lord of Decay
description: Commands the forces of entropy to rot all flesh.

name: Omnipotence
description: A mental command that bends reality to the caster's will.

name: Shadow Wound
description: A slashing attack that leaves a lingering shadow injury.

name: Sacred Grove
description: Creates a field of blessed natural growth that heals allies.

name: Volatile Venom
description: An arcane bolt infused with unstable alchemical toxins.

name: Divine Frost
description: Holy energy manifests as freezing cold purity.

name: Septic Flame
description: Fire that burns with a toxic, infectious heat.

name: Runic Smash
description: A heavy blow empowered by arcane runes.

name: Entropic Decay
description: Shadow magic accelerates natural rot and entropy.

name: Neuro Toxin
description: Nerve toxin, deals nature damage with a chance to stun and poison.

name: Shadow Misdirection
description: Uses shadows to create multiple deceptive images.

name: Faith Armor
description: Prayer hardens the skin like stone through divine will.

name: Sacred Roots
description: Holy light causes vines to grow and restrain enemies.

name: Mana Cycle
description: Converts vitality into renewable magical energy.

name: Terror Cry
description: A warcry infused with shadow that instills fear.

name: Divine Barrier
description: A mana shield reinforced by spiritual prayer.

name: Rooted Healing
description: Healing light that roots enemies in place.

name: Shadow Riposte
description: A counter-attack that repositions the user through shadows.

name: Thorned Regeneration
description: Regrowth that manifests defensive thorns.

name: Corrosive Wound
description: A venomous slash enhanced by acidic properties.

name: Smothering Darkness
description: Toxic fog thickened by shadow into a choking void.

name: Bark Carapace
description: Stone skin reinforced with living bark.

name: Plague Bloom
description: Regrowth twisted to spread disease instead of health.

name: Venom Storm
description: Lightning that carries toxic spores.

name: Rotting Grasp
description: Shadow tendrils that decay natural life.

name: Martyrdom
description: Sacrifices health to heal allies with holy light.

name: Retaliatory Heal
description: Heals the caster when successfully countering an attack.

name: Persistent Life
description: Regrowth that heals over multiple turns.

name: Resurrection Rite
description: A holy word combined with first aid to revive fallen allies.

name: Life Link
description: Attunement that shares healing between holy light recipients.

name: Sanctuary
description: A holy word that creates a safe zone behind a block.

name: Caustic Mend
description: Healing mist that damages enemies standing in it.

name: Frozen Cry
description: A warcry so cold it freezes the air.

name: Decay Aura
description: Shadow energy that rots natural life in an area.

name: Crystal Skin
description: Arcane energy crystallizes the skin into armor.

name: Holy Roots
description: Vines empowered by divine conviction.

name: Phantom Lunge
description: A lunge that disappears into shadows mid-charge.

name: Alchemy Fire
description: Fire used to cauterize wounds while damaging enemies.

name: Storm Seed
description: Plants a seed that grows into a lightning rod.

name: Blood Ice
description: Freezes blood within a wound to cause internal damage.

name: Echoing Prayer
description: A shout that carries a prayer across the battlefield.

name: Arcane Pummel
description: A heavy blow infused with arcane strike energy.

name: Flaming Fist
description: Channel flames into your fists and pummel the enemy.

name: Ice Block
description: A block that freezes attackers on contact.

name: Shockwave
description: A shove amplified by electric shock.

name: Shadow Block
description: A block that phases into shadows to avoid damage.

name: Holy Shove
description: A shove empowered by holy light.

name: Nature Pierce
description: A piercing attack that sprouts thorns in the wound.

name: Poison Lunge
description: A lunge that injects poison on impact.

name: Arcane Shield Bash
description: A shield bash reinforced with arcane energy.

name: Fire Wall
description: A block that projects a wall of flame.

name: Wind Cut
description: A slash that uses footwork to create a vacuum blade.

name: Grounded Strike
description: A basic attack that draws power from the earth.

name: Silent Prayer
description: A prayer cast without sound to avoid detection.

name: Focused Rest
description: Rest that recovers resources faster through concentration.

name: Hunter Mark
description: Aiming while stalking reveals the target's weaknesses.

name: Stalking Shadow
description: Stalking enhanced by shadow stepping.

name: Divine Reflection
description: Spell reflection empowered by holy light.

name: Penitent Strike
description: A smite that heals the caster based on blood let.

name: Atonement
description: Mending wounds through prayerful sacrifice.

name: Judgment Field
description: Holy word that entangles and judges enemies.

name: Spirit Walk
description: Void walking while attuned to the natural spirit realm.

name: Weak Poison
description: Inflict a weak poison. Mild damage over time.

name: Strong Poison
description: Inflict a strong poison. Heavy damage over time, weakens conviction.

name: Deadly Poison
description: Inflict a deadly poison. Severe damage over time, cripples conviction and endurance.

name: Chill
description: Apply a chilling effect — cold damage over time and slowed actions.

name: Electrify
description: Electrify the target — electric damage over time.

name: Shadow
description: Corrupt the target with shadow — shadow damage over time, drains harmony.

name: Arcane Burn
description: Ignite unstable arcane energy in the target — arcane damage over time.

name: Deep Wound
description: Inflict a deep wound that worsens with each hit.

name: Mana Burn
description: Ignite the target's mana reserves — drains mana each turn.

name: Mark
description: Mark the target — enemies focus them.

name: Lifetap
description: Tear life force directly from an enemy, healing yourself.

name: Siphon Ward
description: Curse an enemy so that each strike against them feeds you.

name: Life Leech
description: Bind a tendril of shadow to an enemy, draining their vitality to you each turn.

name: Cursed Blood
description: Corrupt an enemy's blood so every wound they suffer sustains you.

name: Bloodlust
description: A primal surge of violent energy. Temporarily heightens conviction and aggression.

name: Blood Rage
description: The Orc's battle cry becomes supernaturally empowering. All allies gain a surge of conviction.

name: Frenzy
description: A frenzied multi-strike fuelled by bloodlust. Low accuracy, devastating if it lands.

name: Berserker Stance
description: Pain becomes power. Each hit received feeds the rage, stacking conviction until the fight ends.

name: Fortify
description: The Dwarf digs in, becoming nearly immovable. Massively reduces incoming damage for several turns.

name: Iron Will
description: The Dwarf's legendary endurance inspires the entire party, restoring stamina to all allies.

name: Second Wind
description: The Dwarf refuses to fall. A surge of resilience restores both stamina and health simultaneously.

name: Silence
description: Severs the target's connection to mana-based skills for several turns. Not a volume effect — a frequency cut. The target can still think. They simply cannot reach what they were reaching for.

name: Dispel
description: Identifies and removes foreign enchantments from a target. Originally a Verdant Word diagnostic technique. The elves taught it to the Order and then watched the Order use it incorrectly for two hundred years.

name: Water Bolt
description: A pressurized lance of water with enough force to stagger. The Tidebound do not call it this. They do not name their skills at all — naming implies the ability exists independently of the spirit's will, and they do not believe that.

name: Tidal Grasp
description: Water pressure applied with intent. The target is held in place by a column of water that surrounds them and squeezes. The Tidebound use it to isolate targets before the current closes in.

name: Fraying Touch
description: The Fraying made contact. The residue of broken oaths, conducted through proximity. It does not deal damage the way fire or steel does. It introduces a wrongness that the body registers as damage because it has no better category.

name: Ward Break
description: Force and electricity applied at the resonant frequency of a magical seal. The Goldcrown Usurpers developed this specifically for breaching Verdant Word wards. The Ward-Breakers consider its broader applications a bonus.

name: Cleanse
description: Removes foreign magic from an ally. The Verdant Word used it to clear corrupted nature energy from blighted sites. Elara used it on halflings who picked up marsh corruption on their boots. She has not used it on anyone in fifty years.

name: Undertow
description: A current beneath the surface that catches everything in range. The Tidebound High Chanters call it when the perimeter has failed and they need to reset positioning. It does not discriminate between targets.

name: Stone Ward
description: A barrier of living glass grown from ambient light and nature magic. The term is a translation artifact from the Old Tongue. The barrier reflects rather than absorbs, which the elves consider more elegant.

name: Untrained Strike
description: A wild, clumsy swing with whatever is at hand. Slow, costs significant stamina, and likely to miss — but it's always an option when nothing else is.
